user.title: ESPHome Display Helpers
user.description:
This integration creates helper entities so your ESPHome display can show notifications and to-do lists.

Pick what you want to enable below — everything is optional.

data_description.notifications: Creates input_text.notification_title / notification_body and input_select.notification_severity so you can push notifications to your display
data_description.default_severity: Alert level used when no severity is specified
data_description.todo_entities: Each selected list gets a sensor that reformats items for ESPHome to read

data_description.default_timeout: How long notifications display by default before auto-closing (0 = manual dismiss only)
